variants.name: 游侠
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：当晚如果他将要死亡，他不会死亡，且在此之后你要额外选择一名玩家：如果你选中了爪牙，你和他一起死亡。
variants.otherNightReminder: Wake the Ranger. They will choose a player. Then, put the Ranger to sleep.
variants.flavor: You're safe with me, my friend. If anyone so much as lays a finger on you, they will face my wrath.
